title: Tesla in-cabin camera fails to prevent 60 mph naps as Wisk Aero faces lawsuit
summary: On today’s surveillance-heavy episode of Quick Charge, it sure looks like Tesla’s in-cabin driver cam failed to stop one woman from falling asleep at the wheel, but safety and attention monitoring may not be the end game for that camera after all.

title: BMW’s iX4 EV captured with a new look as its debut nears [Images]
summary: The 2027 iX4 is set to join BMW’s electric vehicle lineup soon, bringing a new coupe SUV-like style to the family. Ahead of its debut, the 2027 BMW iX4 was spotted ripping around the Nürburgring, flaunting its new look.

title: Tesla app code reveals cabin camera will verify driver before FSD
summary:
Code buried in Tesla’s latest iOS app update points to a new feature that would use the in-car cabin camera to verify a driver’s identity before allowing “Full Self-Driving” to activate.

If the system can’t confirm the person behind the wheel matches an authorized profile, it would block FSD and surface a failure message in the app.

title: Kia is killing off its flagship sedan as it shifts to more efficient, lower-cost EVs
summary: Kia is trading in its flagship sedan after 14 years to focus on smaller, more affordable electric vehicles.

title: Tesla Cybercab: mass-producing a car it can’t sell or drive itself
summary:
Tesla is ramping up production of the Cybercab at Giga Texas, with more than 100 of the steering-wheel-less two-seaters already spotted in the factory’s outbound lots.

The problem is that Tesla can’t sell it to you, and it can’t yet drive itself without a human watching — which raises the obvious question of why Tesla is building the car at all right now.

title: Amazon slashes $410+ off Worx 1/4-acre robot mower, 50% drop on Anker SOLIX S2000 power station, Autel level 2 EV charger $909, more
summary:
Today’s 9to5Toys Green Deals is headlined by the 1/4-acre Worx Landroid robot lawn mower at more than $410 off, the new Anker SOLIX S2000 at nearly 50% off, as well as Autel’s MaxiCharger AC Pro level 2 charger down at $909. That’s just a few of the things you’ll find below, so keep on reading to fully catch up.

Head below for other Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek‘s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: GM halts shipments and recalls nearly 15,000 Cadillac electric SUVs
summary: GM halted shipments and issued a recall for nearly 15,000 Cadillac Vistiq SUVs. The recall is due to faulty third-row seats that could trap passengers, similar to the issue with the Hyundai Palisade.

title: Jasion Hunter Pro review: A folding fat tire full-suspension e-bike for cheap
summary:
For some companies, the budget e-bike market has become a race to cram as many headline-worthy specs as possible into a bike without crossing the psychologically important $1,000 mark. Bigger motors, bigger batteries, higher speeds, full suspension – they’re all showing up on bikes that would have sounded impossible at this price just a few years ago.

The new Jasion Hunter Pro is the latest entrant into that category, promising an 1,800W peak motor, a 720 Wh battery, hydraulic brakes, full suspension, folding frame, and Class 3 speeds, all for just $999.

title: Hyundai’s electric SUVs are winning over buyers, and it’s easy to see why
summary: The IONIQ 5 is one of the most popular EVs right now outside of Tesla, and now Hyundai’s three-row electric SUV is finding its niche.

title: BYD’s flagship electric sedan receives 65,000 locked-in orders
summary: The Seal 08 boasts “the power of a million-dollar vehicle,” but can be bought for under $30,000 in China. After it went on sale last week, locked-in orders for BYD’s new flagship electric sedan reached around 65,000 in its first 30 hours.

title: Mercedes' New Production Plan Could Make The 'Baby' G-Class EV Far Cheaper
summary: Mercedes’ smaller G-Class may not be built in Germany but in Hungary alongside the brand’s other budget models.

title: Skip The Rivian R2 Waitlist For Just $20,000 Over Sticker Price
summary: The first used Rivian R2 has hit the market with just 50 miles on the odometer and a price tag that's $19,000 above MSRP.

title: After EV Batteries, China Wants To Dominate Car Brains Too
summary: Several Chinese carmakers are developing their own smart-driving chips, aiming to cut costs, move faster, and rely less on third parties.

title: This 2023 Tesla Model 3 Has The 'Durable' Battery. It Still Degraded
summary: Its LFP pack had 90% health at 26,000 miles. That’s not a disaster, but it’s worse than the chemistry’s reputation suggests.

title: The Hyundai Ioniq 5 Is Now America's Best-Selling EV That Isn't A Tesla
summary: While other vehicles have decreased in sales, the Hyundai Ioniq 5 has increased in sales compared to last year.

title: Polestar EVs Are A Whopping $25,000 Off After The Brand Got Kicked Out Of America
summary: You can get a Polestar 4 for Chevy Equinox EV money as the company looks to clear out inventory.

title: This Is Tesla's New, Bigger Model Y For The U.S.
summary: The Model Y L features an extended wheelbase, more interior space, and 325 miles of range.

title: BYD Reclaimed The EV Sales Crown Despite Tesla's Huge Quarter
summary: Tesla posted one of its strongest quarters yet, but BYD still managed to reclaim the global EV sales crown.

title: Lucid Just Had A Big Executive Shakeup. Here's What You Need To Know
summary: Last month, Lucid said goodbye to its top engineer. Now it's bringing in a new leadership team.

title: This $1.4 Million EV Has A Weird Trick To Hit 60 MPH In 1.55 Seconds
summary: The McMurtry Spéirling Pure gets 1,000 hp, a 100-kWh battery, and fans that suck it down to the track.
